"focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "
If you don't want to miss alarms:
 - Don't move app to sdCard - alarms and widget won't work
 - Alarms don't work when phone
        is turned off
 - Add alarm clock to exclude list in task killer applications - remember - task killer apps are no good in Android system, system will
        be more stable without them
 - Keep in mind that Android system works different than ie. typical Windows PC. System will start 'killing' processes if
        there won't be enough free RAM for running foreground applications. It may 'kill' any application - including alarm clock. So make sure you don't
        have unnecessary applications working in the background (ie. application works in the background if it was quit by HOME button) or if you have really
        important thing to do set another 'standard' alarm clock.
